name: The Masterpiece
effect: Deploy an architecturally sophisticated solution to a problem the audience has already worked around. This card is considered visionary.

clauses.name: ELEGANCE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the design is praised in a meeting: Adoption is not required for the quarter.

clauses.name: WORKAROUND OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If a simpler solution already exists: This card remains in play and is considered complementary.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: After two quarters: The design document is considered legacy.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Was anyone asked what they needed?
